states.label: recommended analogue
states.description: Closest local analogue for the current BRB switch selection.

states.label: compatible alternative
states.description: A usable manual choice with partial overlap in feel.

states.label: source available but no close match
states.description: Local source exists, but the current switch profile does not align closely.

states.label: no recommendation
states.description: No honest local recommendation is available for the current switch selection.

heuristics.disclaimer: Analogue-only heuristic derived from BRB switch family, silent flag, and soundProfile.attack/clickiness/thock. Nothing here is presented as a scientifically exact acoustic match.

mechvibes-v1-cherrymx-blue-abs.summary: Bright click-jacket analogue with low thock and clear top-out.

mechvibes-v1-cherrymx-brown-abs.summary: Moderate tactile analogue with a restrained top-out.

mechvibes-v1-cherrymx-red-pbt.summary: Lighter linear analogue with more brightness than body.

mechvibes-v1-cherrymx-black-pbt.summary: Heavier linear analogue with a subdued top-end.

mechvibes-v1-topre-purple-hybrid-pbt.summary: Rounded tactile analogue with deeper body and quieter top-out.

mechvibes-v1-eg-oreo.summary: Sharper tactile analogue for more vocal tactile profiles.

mechvibes-v2-mxblue-travel.summary: Full-travel click analogue with explicit press variation.

mechvibes-v2-mxblack-travel.summary: Heavy linear full-travel analogue with more low-end body.

mechvibes-v2-cream-travel.summary: Deep linear analogue that also works as a muted tactile fallback.

mechvibes-v2-holy-pandas.summary: Dense tactile analogue with strong body and limited sparkle.

mechvibes-v2-turquoise.summary: Hybrid analogue for sharp tactile or click-adjacent profiles.

bucklespring-gpl-canonical-31.summary: Buckling-spring archetype with extreme click emphasis.
